2606.07244.title: Beyond Waypoints: A Trajectory-Centric Waypointing Paradigm for Vision-Language Navigation
2606.07244.paper_summary: Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) requires agents to follow natural-language instructions while navigating in real-world-like environments. Most VLN-CE approach\-es adopt a three-stage framework: a waypoint predictor proposes navigable waypoints, and a navigator selects the best waypoint, with a low-level controller executing the movement to it. However, this decoupled paradigm often leads to unreachable waypoints or inconsistencies between planning and control. In this work, instead of predicting isolated waypoints, we introduce a novel paradigm called Trajectory Waypoint, which grounds each candidate waypoint in an executable trajectory. To realize this, we design a Trajectory Waypoint Predictor formulated as a TSDF-guided diffusion policy, which steers trajectory generation away from obstacles, inherently ensuring the reachability of the predicted waypoints. We further propose a trajectory-enhanced navigator that injects the associated trajectory as additional information for planning, enabling strict consistency between high-level semantic decisions and low-level execution. Extensive experiments on the VLN-CE benchmark show that our Trajectory Waypoint paradigm achieves superior performance over the baselines.
2606.07244.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言導航於連續環境（VLN-CE）要求代理在類似真實世界的環境中遵循自然語言指令進行導航。大多數 VLN-CE 方法採用三階段框架：一個路徑點預測器提出可導航的路徑點，導航器選擇最佳路徑點，並由低階控制器執行移動到該路徑點。然而，這種解耦的範式常常導致無法到達的路徑點或規劃與控制之間的不一致。在本研究中，我們引入一種名為軌跡路徑點的新範式，而不是預測孤立的路徑點，該範式將每個候選路徑點基於可執行的軌跡進行定位。為了實現這一點，我們設計了一個軌跡路徑點預測器，該預測器被公式化為一種 TSDF 引導的擴散策略，旨在使軌跡生成遠離障礙物，從而固有地確保預測路徑點的可達性。我們進一步提出了一個增強軌跡的導航器，將相關的軌跡作為額外信息注入規劃中，使高階語義決策與低階執行之間實現嚴格的一致性。在 VLN-CE 基準上的大量實驗表明，我們的軌跡路徑點範式在性能上優於基線。
2606.07244.author: Haoxiang Shi et.al.
2606.07244.authors: Haoxiang Shi, Xiang Deng, Haoyu Zhang, Qiaohui Chu, Yaowei Wang, Liqiang Nie
